query:
SELECT 
  sport,
  game_date,
  published_to_feed,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM games
WHERE game_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
GROUP BY sport, game_date, published_to_feed
ORDER BY game_date DESC, sport;
